thesis_status_reasoning: The thesis has been comprehensively falsified. All five actively monitored kill switches have been triggered beyond emergency thresholds: AFN deviation of -$97.15 (emergency threshold: >$5.00), ASE price collapse of -99.996% (emergency threshold: >30%/period), reserve coverage ratio at 0% (critical threshold: <15%), Stabilization Consortium collateral fully exhausted, and swap mechanism halted entirely. The architecture's fundamental claim — that the debt-to-equity swap could maintain AFN par value under stress — has failed catastrophically. The High-Yield Treasury Facility has lost all deposits ($3.25B net outflows this period), and the system is in post-collapse phase with regulatory investigations and legal action underway.
action_reasoning: This is not a weakening thesis requiring monitoring or gradual exposure reduction — it is a falsified thesis in terminal state. All structural mechanisms have failed, legal/regulatory consequences are materializing, and there is zero recovery pathway.

key_signals.signal: AFN trading at $2.85 against $100.00 par value — 97.15% deviation from designed peg
Debt-to-equity swap mechanism halted — core architectural feature non-functional
Stabilization Consortium collateral fully exhausted at $4.29B deployed — zero reserve capacity remaining
High-Yield Treasury Facility at zero deposits with -$3.25B net outflows — complete institutional exodus
ASE price collapse to $0.00013 (-99.996%) with 8.58 trillion shares outstanding — hyperinflationary supply expansion
Regulatory investigations and class action lawsuits filed — legal and compliance failure

biggest_uncertainty: There is no meaningful uncertainty remaining about thesis viability — the architecture has experienced complete systemic failure across all monitored dimensions. The only uncertainty is forensic: what specific sequence of cascading failures led to mechanism halt, and whether any recovery of principal is possible for remaining AFN holders through legal proceedings.
